zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Lawrence Stacie於1520年出生在英國英格蘭艾可艾皮三時，他的父親John Stacy28歲，母親Jean Joan Tourney25歲。他於1545年與Alice Shirley在英國英格蘭艾可艾皮三結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1561年11月29日在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可艾皮三。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Lawrence Stacie于1520年出生在英国英格兰艾可艾皮三时，他的父亲John Stacy28岁，母亲Jean Joan Tourney25岁。他于1545年与Alice Shirley在英国英格兰艾可艾皮三结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1561年11月29日在他的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可艾皮三。

nameMeanings.name: Stacie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanized form of Polish, Sorbian, and Czech   Stach   1.

variants.name: Stach
meanings: Polish, Czech, Slovak, and Sorbian: from the personal name Stach, a pet form of Polish and Sorbian Stanisław, Czech and Slovak Stanislav .
German: from a male personal name, a shortened vernacular form of Latin Eustatius or Eustachius (see Stacey , Eustace ).
North German: metonymic occupational name from Middle Low German stach ‘thick rope, hawser’ (for securing ships masts), for a maker of those or for a shipper.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Lawrence Stacie was born in 1520, in Epping, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Stacy, was 28 and his mother, Jean Joan Tourney, was 25. He married Alice Shirley in 1545, in Epping, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 November 1561, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Epping, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Lawrence Stacie est né en 1520, à Epping, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Stacy, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Jean Joan Tourney, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice Shirley en 1545, à Epping, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 novembre 1561, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Epping, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Ely Circuit, Cambridgeshire, England, Un: Ely Circuit, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Lawrence Stacie 1520 in Epping, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Stacy 28 und seine Mutter Jean Joan Tourney 25. Er hat 1545 in Epping, Essex, England, United Kingdom Alice Shirley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. November 1561 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Epping, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lawrence Stacie è nato il nel 1520 nel Epping, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Stacy, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Jean Joan Tourney, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice Shirley nel 1545, nel Epping, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 novembre 1561, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Epping, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Lawrence Stacieが1520年にイギリスイギリスエセックスエップイングで生まれた時，父John Stacyは28歳，母Jean Joan Tourneyは25歳であった。1545年にイギリスイギリスエセックスエップイングでAlice Shirleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1561年11月29日に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスエップイングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Lawrence Stacie(이)가 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핀그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Stacy(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Jean Joan Tourney(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핀그에서 Alice Shirley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1561년 11월 29일 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핀그에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Lawrence Stacie родился в 1520 г. в местности эппинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Stacy было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Jean Joan Tourney, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Shirley в 1545 г. в местности эппинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 ноября 1561 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности эппинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice Shirley en 1545, en Epping, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas.
